name: Birkdale Round Marble/Wood End Table White - Threshold™: Elegant Accent Furniture, No Assembly Required
description:
Update your living space with the perfect mix of function and style with the Birkdale Round Marble/Wood End Table White from Threshold™. This round end table features a thick marble top with solid wooden base that's supported by a solid metal frame for an elegant and distinctive look. The black metal base provides contrast to the white and brown marble/wood tabletop, and the metallic X-shaped bottom offers contemporary styling and stability to the overall design. Perfect for displaying your favorite artwork or accent decor, place this round end table next to the living room sofa for an elegant and distinctive look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
